task: Analyze the provided Git repository fixture and identify graph labeling code related to wrong node labels.

issue.title: Graph nodes show file names instead of symbol labels
issue.body: After a successful analysis, the visual graph renders several nodes with path-like labels instead of function names. Node and edge counts are correct, but labels are wrong.

comments.body: The UI is just rendering the label field it receives from the backend.

tools.name: list_repo_files
tools.description: List bounded Python files in the provided repository.

tools.name: search_repo_symbols
tools.description: Search Python functions/classes in the repository and rank them against issue evidence.

tools.name: search_repo_text
tools.description: Search code text for symptoms and output strings.

tools.name: read_repo_file
tools.description: Read bounded Python file contents from the repository.
